title: 4.4 Threaded Binary Trees
subtitle: Threading concept, traversal optimization, and extension-ready visualization/code/practice

content.introduction: Threaded binary trees replace null pointers with traversal threads to reduce auxiliary stack/recursion usage during traversal.

sections.title: 4.4.1 Key Ideas and Model
sections.content: Define predecessor/successor threads and left-thread/right-thread tags. Explain threaded node semantics.
examples: Mark null links as inorder predecessor/successor threads
Explain thread tag meaning in node fields
Differentiate normal child link from thread link

sections.title: 4.4.2 Representation and Workflow
sections.content: Describe threading construction based on inorder (or other orders) and how traversal follows threads efficiently.
examples: Build inorder threads on a small binary tree
Handle insertion impact on nearby threads

sections.title: 4.4.3 Complexity and Practical Guidance
sections.content: Discuss traversal efficiency benefits, maintenance complexity during updates, and suitable application scenarios.
examples: Compare traversal overhead with ordinary binary tree
Estimate update complexity in threaded structures
Use threading when traversal frequency dominates updates

keyTakeaways: Construct and traverse threaded trees correctly
Apply threading in read-heavy traversal workflows
